hero.badge: Designed for students, developers, and Minecraft server owners
hero.title: TaiwanFRP
hero.subtitle_line1: Easily connect your local server, hidden behind a NAT or firewall, to the internet
hero.subtitle_line2: No public IP needed, no router configuration required. We provide a free and stable internal network penetration service, making it easy for you to go live with your exclusive game server and development projects.
